reason: Without aggregate cancellation or total variation control, fixed-pair estimates reproduce only Markov-scale or worse bounds.
If Q_id(1/n) is zero or near-zero, numerator savings do not survive normalization.
The surface numerator also requires the surface relation, MPvH/Witten-zeta normalization, Nau boundedness, Q_id, and Selberg weights.
